title: Solving math word problems
summary: We’ve trained a system that solves grade school math problems with nearly twice the accuracy of a fine-tuned GPT-3 model. It solves about 90% as many problems as real kids: a small sample of 9-12 year olds scored 60% on a test from our dataset, while our system scored 55% on those same problems.
summaryZh: 我们训练了一个解决小学数学问题的系统，其精度几乎是微调的GPT-3模型的两倍。它解决的问题约为真实孩子的90 ％ ：一小部分9-12岁的孩子在我们的数据集测试中得分为60 ％ ，而我们的系统在这些相同的问题上得分为55 ％。
highlights: We’ve trained a system that solves grade school math problems with nearly twice the accuracy of a fine-tuned GPT-3 model.
It solves about 90% as many problems as real kids: a small sample of 9-12 year olds scored 60% on a test from our dataset, while our system scored 55% on those same problems.
